prompt:
Luxury fashion advertisement poster, ultra-premium editorial style (PRADA aesthetic), minimalist warm beige architectural background with soft sunlight and natural shadows, curved wall elements, marble surface.
A confident elegant East Asian female model with soft wavy brown hair, natural glowing skin, subtle makeup, wearing a silky champagne satin draped top with scarf neckline, high-waisted tailored taupe trousers with pleats, and a structured blazer casually draped over one shoulder. Gold minimal jewelry (earrings, bracelet, necklace). Relaxed yet powerful pose, seated slightly on marble edge, one hand in pocket.
Include a luxury handbag placed beside the model on marble surface.
Lighting: soft cinematic daylight, high-end fashion photography, realistic skin texture, premium magazine quality.
Color palette: warm neutrals, champagne, taupe, beige, soft gold accents.
Typography layout:
Top center: large serif luxury font text “PRADA”
Left side: “DISCOVER
THE NEW
ELEGANCE”
Below it: “SPRING / SUMMER 2026”
Bottom right small text: “BEYOND FASHION, BEYOND TIME.”
Design style: clean, spacious layout, strong hierarchy, editorial balance, high fashion magazine ad, sharp focus, ultra-realistic, 4K
